query:
INSERT INTO ingredients (
  id, name, supplier, category, unitType, packageType, department,
  packageQuantity, packagePrice, pricePerKgOrUnit, minOrderQuantity,
  brand, isActive, is_food, isOrderable, isSellable, isSalaItem,
  createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES
('SAL001', 'Pepsi Lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL002', 'Pepsi Zero lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL003', 'Lipton Limone lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL004', 'Lipton Pesca lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL005', 'Mirinda lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL006', 'Coca Cola lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL007', 'Coca Cola Zero lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL008', 'Fanta lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL009', 'Sprite lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('SAL010', 'Estathe Pesca lattina', 'Allegro', 'Bevande', 'u', NULL, 'Sala', 24.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, '', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), department = 'Sala', packageType = VALUES(packageType), updatedAt = NOW();
